title: Real-Time Collaboration Provider
description: Provider for real-time collaboration (WebSocket or WebRTC).

provider.description: The provider type for real-time collaboration. 'websocket' uses WebSocket, 'webrtc' uses WebRTC.

signalingUrls.description: List of signaling server URLs for WebRTC. If empty, defaults to the server's WebSocket URL with path 'api/signaling'.
